qry:select.name: qry_datosPadre
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table(' SELECT liq19_liquidacion.oi_liquidacion id, c_empresa, d_empresa, c_liquidacion, d_titulo, f_acreditacion FROM liq19_liquidacion, org03_empresas WHERE {%? (string(#SOURCE:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id)!='') {% liq19_liquidacion.oi_liquidacion in ({%=string(#SOURCE:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id) %}) %} {% 1=2 %} %} AND liq19_liquidacion.oi_empresa = org03_empresas.oi_empresa ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_Acred
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in table(' SELECT per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp oi_personal_emp , per01_personal.d_ape_y_nom d_ape_y_nom , \'DNI\' c_tipo_doc , per01_personal.c_dni c_dni
, liq07_personal.c_cta_bancaria c_cta_bancaria , sum(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totpag) totaPagar , liq22_bancos_sucur.c_suc_bancaria c_suc_bancaria , liq22_bancos_sucur.c_sucursal c_sucursal , liq22_bancos_sucur.d_sucursal d_sucursal , liq15_empresa_bcos.c_convenio c_convenio , liq22_bancos.c_banco c_banco , liq22_bancos.d_banco d_banco
FROM liq25_personal_liq, per02_personal_emp, per01_personal, liq07_personal, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER , liq22_bancos_sucur, liq15_empresa_bcos, liq22_bancos WHERE
{%? (string(#SOURCE:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id)!='') {% liq25_personal_liq.oi_liquidacion in ({%=string(#SOURCE:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id) %}) %} {% 1=2 %} %}
AND per02_personal_emp.oi_personal = per01_personal.oi_personal AND Liq20_tot_liq_per.oi_tot_liq_per = liq25_personal_liq.oi_tot_liq_pers AND per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp = liq25_personal_liq.oi_personal_emp AND liq07_personal.oi_personal_emp = liq25_personal_liq.oi_personal_emp and liq22_bancos.oi_banco = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_banco %} and liq07_personal.oi_sucursal = liq22_bancos_sucur.oi_sucursal and liq22_bancos_sucur.oi_banco = liq15_empresa_bcos.oi_banco and LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totpag != 0 and liq22_bancos_sucur.oi_banco = liq22_bancos.oi_banco AND per02_personal_emp.oi_empresa = liq15_empresa_bcos.oi_empresa group by per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp, d_ape_y_nom , liq22_bancos_sucur.c_sucursal , liq22_bancos_sucur.d_sucursal, c_dni, c_cta_bancaria, c_suc_bancaria, c_convenio , liq22_bancos.c_banco, liq22_bancos.d_banco order by per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_datosPadreAcum
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in table(' SELECT liq22_bancos.oi_banco oi_banco , liq22_bancos.c_banco c_banco , liq22_bancos.d_banco d_banco , COUNT(DISTINCT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL_EMP) CANTIDAD , SUM(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.N_TOTPAG) TOTAL FROM liq25_personal_liq, per02_personal_emp, per01_personal, liq07_personal, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER , liq22_bancos_sucur, liq15_empresa_bcos, liq22_bancos WHERE {%? (string(#SOURCE:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id)!='') {% liq25_personal_liq.oi_liquidacion in ({%=string(#SOURCE:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id) %}) %} {% 1=2 %} %}
AND per02_personal_emp.oi_personal = per01_personal.oi_personal AND Liq20_tot_liq_per.oi_tot_liq_per = liq25_personal_liq.oi_tot_liq_pers AND per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp = liq07_personal.oi_personal_emp AND liq07_personal.oi_personal_emp = liq25_personal_liq.oi_personal_emp and liq07_personal.oi_sucursal = liq22_bancos_sucur.oi_sucursal and liq22_bancos_sucur.oi_banco = liq15_empresa_bcos.oi_banco and LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totpag != 0 and liq22_bancos_sucur.oi_banco = liq22_bancos.oi_banco and liq22_bancos.oi_banco = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_banco %} AND per02_personal_emp.oi_empresa = liq15_empresa_bcos.oi_empresa group by liq22_bancos.c_banco, liq22_bancos.d_banco,liq22_bancos.oi_banco ')/ROWS/ROW
